title: lastrea rivularioides
intro: Lastrea rivularioides, also known as the rivularioid fern, is a type of plant species in the fern family (Dryopteridaceae) native to tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lastrea rivularioides include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions to utilize its medicinal properties.
